title: Yosys ABC error/segmentation fault in SymbiFlow

features.name: variable_index_write_to_unpacked_array_memory
features.description: Code should include a sequential always block that writes to an unpacked array of registers using a variable index counter

features.name: mixed_fixed_and_variable_index_memory_access
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array memory where one index (zero) is read via continuous assignment while another index is written via a variable counter in a sequential block

features.name: fsm_with_non_power_of_two_localparam_states
features.description: Code should include a finite state machine using localparam with non-power-of-two state values and a case statement to describe state transitions

features.name: trailing_comma_in_module_instantiation
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation with a trailing comma after the last port connection
